this is a iana domain off me and has never ran any public, so ...

This shall hopefull open a lot off coders as i did all effort to stop the insain case off "the stockholders" having access to the root , this means internet2 is now running , as i have no problem with money the ROOT is the file we all have rfc work on as all the arpa did in 1983 was from darpa the internet as users see is not a browser or apps , the first rule off any socket netwerk is the AF_, the address family , for routing we make ourself a CVE due fact a cookie and use off the https this is wild abused due the w3c allowance off sql files off 5mb per host those files have now json data and an event listener on the html header so the DOM as first line is ignored and by use off unicode in DNS we got now a url that looks in the json with what i did in the 90's use off BBS thedraw and in one irq call sended the DOS it's window with ansi as colors and shapes , the use off unicode in the socket is for tcp or udp now ports before public now in the 0-1024 opens a protocol move as tcp uses 7 multicast seems on 2 vrrp runs on the 50 -70 which overlaps the dhcp,bootstrap, just by use off same port but in different protocols , as 2²8 makes 256 unsigned now suddenly by unicode in the base runs 2²16 , 65535 as ports in the socket layer are 16 bit but now we have 2 times 16 bit ports so what happens the first listens and sends the destination which is random to the source eg 443 that maps the random back in same process but now as destination making a full tcp connect , and all http is gone, if i wanna make a webcall i choose whatever port , the org is even https , why?????, because we all forget one thing the browser isn't a nice and no hidden catches, that we have to realize due 2015 the w3c stopped, ip6 great for who... , 2²64, but the reality is that we operate all by use off browsers , sending a tftp, a pxe, a bin , every device firmware gets uploaded now if you use a trace to 128.255.255.255 which is the brother for the 127 so we got a subnet off 255.0.0.0 , that's now routeable so for the pfsense that needs the BSD as else it is hopeless this is for all devices , Berkley Sockets , we need to distribute a new base header that kills any unicode attempts in the most important file as the OS like windows uses winsock but in a dll not as code , and that will never change but the code now becomes Javascript in runtime use off the rexec or lpr, write.exe off 1995 lands on linux as shadowroot now my code was for 6 months under attack , as i knew what was going on so please do a history check as borland and berkley , the code i wrote was from scratch out the sockets.io book in 1993 , as a lot off fake stuff appears now and all users are "engineers" they plug a device and they are on the move, my isp asks first tech for TV, then e-mail, then internet????, then phone, I don't want a data packet going out with in the MAC ethernet II, icann now really messed up and i gave darpa as NSA the advice drop the 127.0.0.0 out the backbone , made my iana domainname ip 010.010.010.010 , do i something wrong as its just 10.10.10.10, but nope it resolves to 8.8.8.8 , the fonts are used to inject code , so i hope some coders see the real issue and we need to adapt the base header due the subnet mask is gone as an interface gets a mask it routes on 0.0.0.0 if it's internal, but we have no internall anymore due the ip6 maps the isp giving a ip4 on the wan but the subnet never gets /8 as cidr , and ip6 ::1 , vector and tensor , G5, what is the end??? we are now in "The license" as Appache.org is for sale so that is not 
what ARPA is but back to DARPA and in any way i shall assist but the root file is ours BSD even wrote the DNS for darpa, so for any BSD I also target to the IEEE802 and other hardware that is by owner automaticly protected by the BSD as company how is that now??
